title: Combination A: IR Clue
bodyText: Unknown A has formula C4H10O. Use the IR spectrum first: click the strong C-O stretch that supports an alcohol or ether.

figures.description: Mock placeholder: normally this would show a combined evidence panel with formula C4H10O, IR peaks, selected NMR shifts, and a small MS peak table.

feedbacks: Correct: this C-O stretch is useful evidence for an oxygen-containing saturated compound.
Not quite. In this mock set, the most diagnostic C-O stretch is around 1245 cm^-1.
